meaning: the praise (subject of belongs to اللَّهِ)
for him/to him/belongs to him (connected to مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - what is in the heavens)
and what/whatever (connects to previous phrase مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)
the Hereafter (possessed by Allah in this ayah)
and He (refers to Allah in this ayah)
he enters deeply (into الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
he goes out/exits (present action in يَعْلَمُ sequence)
and what (connects to يَخْرُجُ - comes out)
he descends (present action in مَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ - what descends from the sky)
in it (referring to الأرض - the earth)
and he said (subject of ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)
not (negates تَأْتِينَا - will come to us)
The Hour (subject of لَا تَأْتِينَا - does not come to us)
yes indeed, certainly (responding to لَا تَأْتِينَا - 'it will not come to us')
and my Lord (in وَرَبِّى لَتَأْتِيَنَّكُمْ - and by my Lord, it will surely come to you)
I swear you all will definitely come/arrive (addressing the disbelievers)
the weight (subject of يَعْزُبُ - escapes/is hidden)
of a tiny particle/atom (object of مِثْقَالُ)
and not - combines two ideas and makes them negative
in (location of مِثْقَالُ ذَرَّةٍ - weight of an atom)
and not (connects to previous لَا and negates أَصْغَرُ - smaller)
except (excluding what comes after from what was mentioned before)
so that he rewards (those who believe)
those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)
the righteous deeds (acted on by عَمِلُوا)
those (who believed and did good deeds)
for them (referring to الَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا - those who believed)
and those who (who strove against Our signs)
they moved quickly with effort (referring to those who opposed in وَٱلَّذِينَ)
those who try to challenge/frustrate (Allah's signs)
for/to them (refers to those who strive against Our signs)
severely painful (describes عَذَابٌ, in a general sense)
and he sees (subject of يَهْدِي - guides)
the knowledge (object of أُوتُوا - were given)
which/that (refers to what was sent down)
to you (object of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)
from (connects رَبِّكَ 'your Lord' to what came before)
he (referring to what was sent down)
shall (we show you)? (introduces question about نَدُلُّكُمْ)
we point/direct you all (in response to هَلْ - 'can')
all, every (object of مُزِّقْتُمْ - you were torn)
indeed you all (subject of مُزِّقْتُمْ - were torn apart)
a creation (being described as new in جَدِيدٍ)
did he fabricate (falsely)? (connected to عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا - a lie against Allah)
a lie (object of أَفْتَرَىٰ/has he invented)
or (connecting to أَفْتَرَىٰ - did he invent)
with/by him/it (referring to كَذِبًا - a lie)
a madness (accusation against Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
they believe (those who don't believe in the Hereafter)
And did they not (see ما يَرَوْا)
they see (in response to أَفَلَمْ - 'then do they not')
their hands (referring to what is before them)
we cause to sink (connected to بِهِمُ which shows who is being sunk)
the earth (object being acted upon in نَخْسِفْ)
upon them (connected to نُسْقِطْ - we cause to fall)
that, that one (pointing to something far)
one who earnestly returns (to Allah) (possessed by عَبْدٍ)
a favor, a bounty (object of آتَيْنَا/we gave)
and the birds (as something given to David)
for him (connected to أَلَنَّا - We made soft)
and measure precisely! (command to Prophet Dawud about making armor)
of the weaving (of chain mail links)
righteously/in a good way (describing how the action اعْمَلْ 'do/make' is done)
for him, to him (referring to Sulaiman)
spring/source (object acted upon, of القِطْرِ - molten copper)
of the molten copper (possessed by عَيْنَ)
the jinn (invisible beings mentioned in this ayah about Prophet Sulaiman)
he works/is working (doing work for سُلَيْمٰنَ - Solomon)
he turns away (from أَمْرِنَا - our command)
we make him taste (object of يَزِغْ - deviates)
from (connecting عَذَابِ to what comes before)
of the blazing fire (object of مِنْ عَذَابِ)
they work (referring to the jinn working for Prophet Sulaiman)
from/of (connects مَّحٰرِيبَ to what comes before)
and statues (object of يَعْمَلُونَ - they made)
and cooking pots (acted upon by مِن)
gratitude, thanks (as the object being given)
the creature (as the subject of تَأْكُلُ - it eats)
of the earth (possessed by/connected to something)
she/it eats/is eating (subject of دَآبَّةُ ٱلْأَرْضِ)
his staff (being eaten by دَآبَّةُ ٱلْأَرْضِ)
then when (connects to قَضَيْنَا - we decreed)
the jinn (as the subject who realized)
they know (referring to the jinn in this ayah)
he/it was (past tense verb in لَقَدْ كَانَ)
from/away from (connects يَمِينٍ to what's before it)
from (connects رِّزْقِ to what comes before it)
of provision (with extra emphasis, connected to رَبِّكُمْ - your Lord)
your (all of you) caring Lord (connected to كُلُوا۟ - eat)
and a lord/master (connected to غَفُورٌ - forgiving)
so we sent forth (after they turned away)
upon them (referring to the people who turned away)
possessing/having (feminine dual, describing جَنَّتَيْنِ - two gardens)
and a tamarisk tree (coordinated with خَمْطٍ)
of something little/few (describing سِدْرٍ - lote trees)
we repaid them (referring to الْكَفُورَ - the ungrateful ones)
because of what/that which (connects to كَفَرُوا)
they rejected (truth) (subject of جَزَيْنٰهُم - we recompensed them)
the extremely ungrateful one (object of نُجٰزِىٓ)
between them (connects to وَبَيْنَ after it)
and between (connects previous phrase to القُرَى 'the towns')
which/that (feminine, referring to the villages that)
in it/her (referring to the blessed towns mentioned)
in it (referring to القُرَى 'the towns' mentioned earlier)
O our Lord! (being called out to in فَقَالُوا)
their selves (acted upon by ظَلَمُوا - they wronged)
and we tore them apart completely
indeed/verily (strongly emphasizes the statement فِى ذٰلِكَ لَءَايٰتٍ that follows)
indeed for every/all (connected to صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ)
he confirmed/proved true (the thought of إِبْلِيسُ)
Iblis (Satan's name, as the subject of صَدَّقَ - verified)
so they followed him (refers to إِبْلِيسُ)
a group (object of فَٱتَّبَعُوهُ - they followed)
so that we may know (purpose of having authority over them)
upon (guardian over كُلِّ شَىْءٍ - all things)
those who (refers to the false gods mentioned in زَعَمْتُم)
in both of them (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
from/of (connects شِرْكٍ to what comes before it)
and not (connected to لَا يَمْلِكُونَ - they do not possess)
the act of helping by speaking for someone (subject of تَنفَعُ)
he permitted (subject of قَالَ - he said)
when (followed by فُزِّعَ - terror is removed)
was terrified (referring to what happened to their hearts)
from/away from (connects to قُلُوبِهِمْ - their hearts)
they said (in response to مَاذَا قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ - what did your Lord say?)
your Lord (what was said according to قَالُوا)
they said (referring to those whose hearts had fear removed)
the truth (object of قَالُوا۟ - what they said)
The Most High (subject of the sentence)
The Great One (a name/attribute of Allah)
who (asks about the subject of يَرْزُقُ - provides)
or (connecting هُدًى and ضَلٰلٍ as two possibilities)
in a state of straying (in relation to فِى before it)
no/not (emphasizing the negation of تُسْـَٔلُونَ - you are asked)
you (all) are being asked (about عَمَّآ أَجْرَمْنَا)
about what (asking about تَعْمَلُونَ - what you do)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
he opens/judges between (subject: رَبُّنَا - our Lord)
with the truth (explains how يَفْتَحُ/he will judge is done)
and He (refers to Allah who will judge between us)
The Supreme Judge (one of Allah's names)
the All-Knowing (divine name of Allah, subject of this sentence)
you all made (something) join/catch up (with بِهِۦ)
partners (being accused as false partners with Allah)
rather/but rather (contradicts the previous claim about شُرَكَآءَ partners)
The Mighty, The Powerful (as a name of Allah, subject of this phrase)
a bearer of good news (object of أَرْسَلْنٰكَ - we sent you)
and a warner (connected to بَشِيرًا - bearer of good news)
and yet, but however (connecting to أَرْسَلْنٰكَ - We sent you)
they know (referring to most people in ٱلنَّاسِ)
when (asking about the time of الْوَعْدُ/the promise)
the promise (subject of when will this be?)
for/to you all (emphasizing the statement in قُل)
the appointed time (subject of the sentence)
you (all) seek to delay (related to سَاعَةً - an hour)
from/away from it (referring to يَوْمٍ - a day)
and not (connects to previous negative statement)
with this (connected to نُّؤْمِنَ - we will believe)
the Quran (object of بِ in بِهٰذَا)
when (past time, connected to what follows)
those who are made to stop (the wrongdoers in this ayah)
with/at/by (location relative to رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
some of them (returning words to each other)
he says (describing what one group says to another in this ayah)
those who (subject of يَقُولُ - they say)
they were made weak (by الَّذِينَ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟)
if not/were it not for (addressing those who were arrogant)
to those who (who were made weak)
is it we? (who صَدَدْنٰكُمْ prevented you)
we prevented/blocked you all (addressing the weak ones who were led astray)
the guidance (that was rejected by those who were arrogant)
after (refers to time after إِذْ/when in this ayah)
when (referring to the time after الْهُدَىٰ came)
rather (contradicting what the arrogant ones claimed)
and he said (connected to previous statement)
they were made weak/were considered weak
and of the daytime (connected to مَكْرُ ٱلَّيْلِ - plotting of the night)
when (connecting to تَأْمُرُونَنَآ - you commanded us)
and we make/set (connected to نَّكْفُرَ - we disbelieve)
and they kept secret (connected to previous statement)
when (connects رَأَوُا۟ they saw with what came before)
the chains (that will be placed around the necks of those who disbelieved)
in (connects أَعْنَاقِ to what came before)
those who (referring to those who disbelieved)
they are given what is due
except for (what they used to do)
of a town/village (in فِى قَرْيَةٍ - in a town)
he said (subject of مُتْرَفُوهَآ/their wealthy ones)
with it/by it (referring to what was sent with the warner)
and they said (subject of نَحْنُ أَكْثَرُ)
we (as the subject of قَالُوا - they said)
more numerous (than others in wealth and children)
among those who are being severely punished
and yet/however (connecting to يَبْسُطُ - he extends)
of the people (in أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ - most of the people)
they know (referring to most people in أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ)
and what/and not (connects this to أَمْوٰلُكُمْ)
and not (connects to previous statement about wealth)
by/with the one which (connects to تُقَرِّبُكُمْ - brings you closer)
so those ones (referring to the believers mentioned before)
for them (they have the reward mentioned in جَزَآءُ)
with what (refers to عَمِلُوا - what they did)
they strive/make effort (referring to those who try to invalidate Our signs)
Our signs/miracles (that the disbelievers are trying to challenge)
those who try to frustrate/challenge (Allah's signs)
they (all) are made to be present (in العَذَابِ - the punishment)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the people)
he spreads out (referring to رَبِّى spreading rizq/provision)
he compensates/replaces it (referring to what was spent in the way of Allah)
and (on) the day (object of يَحْشُرُهُمْ - He will gather them)
he gathers them (referring to those who were worshipped besides Allah)
all together (describes how Allah gathers them)
to the angels (who are being addressed by يَقُولُ - he says)
specifically you all (as the object of يَعْبُدُونَ)
they were (subject of يَقُولُ - he says)
they said (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)
Glory be to You! (as an exclamation after قَالُوا/they said)
from (connects دُونِ to what comes before it)
besides them (referring to the false gods they used to worship)
rather/but rather (correcting the previous statement that they were our allies)
the jinn (as the object being worshipped)
so today (in response to their previous actions)
he controls/owns (negated by لَا before it)
some of you (as subject of يَمْلِكُ)
harm (as the object being acted upon in يَمْلِكُ)
they acted unjustly (subject of نَقُولُ - we say)
taste! (command to many people) (referring to عَذَابَ 'punishment')
which, that (feminine, referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)
you all were (referring to those who denied the truth)
with it/her (referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)
it (our clear signs) is being recited (upon them)
our signs (subject of تُتْلَى - are recited)
clear proofs/signs (object of تُتْلَىٰ - being recited)
about what (asking what your forefathers used to worship)
he was (used with يَعْبُدُ to mean 'used to worship')
except, only (in this ayah, used to restrict what follows to being the only possibility)
when (referring to جَآءَهُمْ - it came to them)
came to them (object of قَالَ - he said)
except (this word limits ما هٰذَآ/this is not)
magic (that the disbelievers claimed about the truth)
they study/are studying it (referring to كُتُب/books mentioned earlier)
before you (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
any warner (in context: no warner had been sent before)
and he strongly denied/rejected (subject of the sentence)
before them (refers to those who denied in the previous ayah)
and so they denied/rejected (the messengers mentioned in رُسُلِى)
I advise you all (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)
in pairs, two by two (describing how to تَقُومُوا۟ 'stand/rise')
then, after that (connects تَتَفَكَّرُوا with تَقُومُوا)
you all reflect/think deeply (command to a group)
so he/it (connects to سَأَلْتُكُم - I asked you)
for you all (belongs to فَهُوَ - so it is)
if (introduces the condition that my reward is only from Allah)
a witness (subject of being on/over كُلِّ شَىْءٍ)
he throws forcefully (subject of إِنَّ رَبِّى)
with the truth (object of يَقْذِفُ - he casts)
of the hidden/unseen things (possessed by عَلَّامُ)
if (introduces condition for ضَلَلْتُ/I go astray)
I went astray (connected to فَإِنَّمَآ أَضِلُّ - then I only go astray)
and if (connects to ٱهْتَدَيْتُ - I am guided)
then by what (connects to يُوحِىٓ - is revealed)
indeed he (connected to سَمِيعٌ قَرِيبٌ - All-Hearing, Ever-Near)
when (referring to فَزِعُوا۟ they became terrified)
so there is no (escape from punishment)
we believed! (in response to وَقَالُوٓا۟ - and they said)
the [impossible] reaching (from مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيدٍ - a distant place)
from (connects مَّكَانٍۭ to what comes before)
they rejected/denied (subject of يَقْذِفُونَ - they throw)
and they throw (connected to كَفَرُوا - they disbelieved)
with/by the unseen (describing how they rejected faith in وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟)
a place (connected to مِن before it)
and was prevented (from بَيْنَهُمْ وَبَيْنَ مَا يَشْتَهُونَ)
between them (separated from ما يَشْتَهُونَ - what they desire)
and between (connecting two things being separated in حِيلَ بَيْنَهُمْ وَبَيْنَ مَا يَشْتَهُونَ)
just as (connects to فُعِلَ - was done)
it was done (passive form of فَعَلَ)
with their followers (like what was done to those before them)
indeed they (who are being prevented from what they desire)
they were (referring to those mentioned in إِنَّهُمْ)
in (connects شَكٍّ to what came before)
in doubt (in فِى شَكٍّ - in doubt)
